description:
Response shape for `get_drug_appearance` (Dataset 42, ADR-0013).

Forward-only (license_no → appearance). Citation mirrors the dataset-backed
`SearchDrugsResponse` precedent: `source_url` + `dataset_retrieved_at` +
`attribution` (Dataset 42 has no per-row date). `appearance_on_file=false`
is the 未載明 fact — the license is not in Dataset 42 — NOT a tool failure.

appearance_on_file.description: True iff TFDA Dataset 42 has an appearance row for this license. False = 未載明 (not documented) — appearance covers only ~24% of active licenses; do NOT infer an appearance when this is false.

anyOf.description: Per-response attribution — distinguishes official data from third-party wrapper.

data_official.description: True iff `data_source` is a government/official body.

wrapper.description: Identity of the (third-party) MCP server returning this response.

dataset_age_hours.description: Age of the appearance index in hours at response time.

dataset_retrieved_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC time the appearance index was last loaded.

anyOf.description: Structured error block. `code` is the RCode name (string form, stable identifier).

message.description: Human-readable error message in Traditional Chinese or English.

image_url.description: Official TFDA appearance image URL (mcp.fda.gov.tw). Null if not on file or the stored URL failed host validation. Passed through, NOT fetched — the client loads it if an image is needed.

is_stale.description: True iff the index is past its TTL and a background reload is under way.

license_no.description: Echo of the license_no the caller passed.

name_zh.description: 中文品名 (empty when not on file).
